nodes.label: SuperTimers Running Screen
nodes.description: iOS app main screen showing a timer in running state with countdown display, plus a list of saved timer presets below.

nodes.label: Active Timer Section (실행 중인 타이머)
nodes.description: Top section labeled '실행 중인 타이머' showing the currently-running timer: title '라면 타이머', large countdown '7:59', total duration '8분', with a prominent orange circular pause button on the right.

nodes.label: Timer Presets List (타이머 목록)
nodes.description: Lower section labeled '타이머 목록' containing saved timer presets. Each row shows title, large duration, alert schedule (e.g., '5분전 · 3분전 · 종료시'), and a color-coded circular play button.

nodes.label: Preset: 라면 타이머 #1 (8분)
nodes.description: Timer preset '라면 타이머' with #1 badge (orange pill tag indicating it is currently the active instance). Duration 8분, alerts at 5분전/3분전/종료시, orange play-circle icon.

nodes.label: Preset: 공부 집중 (25분)
nodes.description: Timer preset '공부 집중 (25분)' — a Pomodoro-style focus timer. Duration 25분, alerts at 5분전/종료시, purple play-circle icon.

nodes.label: Preset: 세탁기 (45분)
nodes.description: Timer preset '세탁기' — laundry timer. Duration 45분, alerts at 5분전/종료시, blue play-circle icon.

nodes.label: Preset: 런닝 인터벌 (30분)
nodes.description: Timer preset '런닝 인터벌' — running interval timer with multiple checkpoints. Duration 30분, alerts at 20분전/10분전/5분전/종료시, green play-circle icon.

nodes.label: Add Timer FAB (+ 타이머 추가)
nodes.description: Blue pill-shaped floating action button at the bottom labeled '+ 타이머 추가' for creating a new timer preset.

nodes.label: Design Pattern: Color-coded Timer Identity
nodes.description: Each timer preset is assigned a distinct color (orange/purple/blue/green) applied to its circular action button, letting users recognize timers at a glance and linking the active timer's pause button to its preset color.

nodes.label: Design Pattern: Multi-stage Alerts
nodes.description: Each preset exposes its alert schedule as a middle-dot-separated list (e.g., '20분전 · 10분전 · 5분전 · 종료시'), signaling that timers fire multiple interim alerts, not just a single end notification. This is the app's differentiating feature vs the stock iOS Clock timer.

nodes.label: Design Pattern: Active Instance Badge (#1)
nodes.description: The '#1' pill-shaped badge next to '라면 타이머' in the preset list indicates the preset is currently running as instance #1, linking the list row to the active timer section above. Suggests the app supports multiple concurrent instances of the same preset.

nodes.label: Design Pattern: iOS Native Look
nodes.description: Uses iOS status bar (4:43 / wifi / battery), grouped sections with light gray header labels, thin divider lines, large bold Korean typography, and SF-style rounded iconography — fitting Apple Human Interface Guidelines.
